result.stdout:
build
  Execute runners into solution that implements 'IDiagramBuildRunner' Interface

Usage:
  c4scli [options] build [<path>]

Arguments:
  <path>  The solution file path, if not informed it will search for the first sln file into current directory [default: .]

Options:
  -o, --output <output>  The output path, if not informed it will search for the first sln file into current directory [default: ]
  -d, --doc <doc>        set 'html' to output a document as html page [default: html]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
